items.name: chat-message
items.title: ChatMessage
items.description: Composable chat message with role-based bubble colors, avatar slot, and hover-reveal actions. Supports assistant and user roles with distinct styling.

items.name: code-block
items.title: CodeBlock
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with copy button, line numbers, and streaming-safe Shiki integration. Lazy-loads language grammars with a sync fast-path to avoid flash.

items.name: composer
items.title: Composer
items.description: Auto-resizing message input with header/footer layout slots, Enter-to-submit, and composable sub-components for file previews and action buttons.

items.name: file-preview
items.title: FilePreview
items.description: File attachment chip with auto-detected type icons, color-coded by file category (image, document, code, etc.), thumbnail support, and removable state.

items.name: markdown-renderer
items.title: MarkdownRenderer
items.description: GitHub Flavored Markdown renderer with custom component overrides, integrated syntax highlighting via CodeBlock, and streaming support with aria-busy.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: ScrollArea
items.description: Auto-scrolling container with user scroll intent detection. Distinguishes user scrolls from programmatic ones using wheel/touch events, with a scroll-to-bottom button.
